title: bidens angustissima
intro: Bidens angustissima, also known as Narrow-leaved Beggar ticks or Small Bur Marigold, is a perennial herb native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bidens angustissima include reducing fever, alleviating skin irritations, and treating wounds, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
